title: International Students Office - Mission and Vision
content:
International Students Office - Mission and Vision

Our Mission

With our infinite belief in the integrative effect of our sustainable and disciplined education system, we continue our sefforts to educate young people who prefer us from all around the World to the business sector and through their school lifes in the most equipped way.

Our Vision

To educate individuals with an entrepreneurial spirit with an international perspective, who can keep up with the digitalised era, able to take a leadership-oriented approach to events, as well as take responsibility in any work environment and fulfill their responsibilities in the best way.

This content was updated on 23/09/2024.
